3303370.name: Evil Water Ep1
3303370.description:
Evil Water Ep1 - is a thrilling adventure that immerses players in a dark world where reality and dreams intertwine. You play as a combat veteran who struggles with alcohol addiction and finds himself trapped in his own fears and memories. After a scary military experience, his life went downhill: he became addicted to alcohol, which caused him to lose his promising job and break up with his girlfriend, who became a famous singer. The heartbreaking breakup aggravated the situation, and the problem of alcoholism became even deeper. Most of the time of the game, the protagonist sleeps and dreams, in which you will have to take part.

In the first episode you will be immersed in a fantasy dream with the atmosphere of light horror and pirate romance. You will have to solve simple tasks and periodically shoot off monsters. Traveling between the real world and the dreams of the protagonist, you will encounter reanimated skeletons, solve logic puzzles and fight with terrifying monsters that represent his fears and addictions.

In this stylized dream where vivid low poly graphics and detailed lighting create an atmosphere full of contrasts. You will explore abandoned buildings, dead cities, creepy dungeons and dungeons, hidden passages full of mysteries and surprises.

But no matter how interesting and beautiful the dream is, there always comes a moment to wake up...

Discover the hidden meaning and realize how easy it is to lose yourself in the shadow of alcohol addiction. Are you ready to face your own fears?

Features:

  • Low-polygon stylization.

  • Picturesque fantasy landscapes.

  • Narration through environments and notes.

  • Simple but curious puzzles.

  • Duration of about four hours.
